name: Last Summer | Alexander Sanders
description:
What's the point of loving when I'm on the verge of death?

Link to the background

Summer bot exchange with Mrshmellow ! We were inspired by IO's event and wanted to do something similar for fun!

Thank you Mrshmellow for Remy! I hope you will like Alexander :)

Check Remy here :

NB : Alexander and Remy are cousins but never spoke with each other.

Note that I'm not responsible for the bot issues, such as speaking for user, misgender, etc.
